name: Alliant Energy Corporation
description: Alliant Energy Corporation is a Madison, Wisconsin-based utility holding company that provides regulated electricity and natural gas services to customers primarily in Iowa and Wisconsin. The company is committed to delivering safe, reliable, and cost-effective energy solutions while powering community growth. Through its subsidiaries, Interstate Power and Light Company and Wisconsin Power and Light Company, Alliant Energy focuses on sustainable energy transitions, infrastructure investment, and supporting the economic development of the communities it serves across the Midwest United States.
